latin: Ashitaka dixit: 'oculis sine odio videte!' silva sacra peribat quia homines et dei inter se pugnabant. pax inter naturam et homines quaerenda erat.

questions.prompt: What does Ashitaka ask people to do?
questions.target: See with eyes unclouded by hatred
choices: See with eyes unclouded by hatred

questions.prompt: Why is the sacred forest dying?
questions.target: Humans and gods are fighting each other
choices: Humans and gods are fighting each other
A curse was placed on it

translation: Ashitaka said: 'See with eyes without hatred!' The sacred forest was perishing because humans and gods were fighting each other. Peace between nature and humans had to be sought.
